name: Discover it Secured Credit Card
signup_bonus: Unlimited Cashback Match for first year
perks: Cashback Match - Discover doubles all cash back earned in first year
2% at gas stations and restaurants on up to $1,000 in combined quarterly purchases
Discover automatically reviews account for upgrade to unsecured card after 7 months
No penalty APR for late payments
drawbacks: Requires a refundable security deposit ($200 minimum) equal to your credit limit
High ongoing APR once intro period ends
2% rewards cap at $1,000 per quarter for gas and restaurants
Discover accepted less widely than Visa or Mastercard internationally
